# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=es01
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=es01
      - discovery.type=single-node
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
      - "9300:9300"

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    container_name: logstash
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline
    ports:
      - "5044:5044"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

volumes:
  esdata:
